topic: rain during flowering and poor fruit set
trigger_keywords: alto indice de lluvias durante la floracion

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Rain and cool, unsettled weather occur while vines are flowering.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Wet conditions interfere with pollination and fertilisation and can cause flowers to fail or be shed.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Fruit set is poor, fewer berries develop, and potential yield is reduced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Fruit set is poor, fewer berries develop, and potential yield is reduced.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
